expectations.text: The output contains exactly 3 user stories and does not invent UI stories or browser verification.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Personal Access Token Backend",
  "branchName": "personal-access-token-backend",
  "description": "Add secure personal access token backend actions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add hashed token storage with revocation timestamp",
      "description": "As a system, I want hashed token storage with revocation timestamp default null so token records are revocable and secure.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Token persistence stores token hash and revocation timestamp default null.",
        "Stored token records keep label and ownership metadata for management operations.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_personal_access_tokens.sql",
        "src/domain/personalAccessToken.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add create token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want create-token server action validating label length and returning plaintext token once so callers can store token safely.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create-token action validates label length before issuing token.",
        "Create-token action stores only token hash and returns plaintext token once in response.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/createPersonalAccessToken.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/personalAccessTokenRepo.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add revoke token server action",
      "description": "As a developer, I want revoke-token server action marking tokens revoked without deletion so revocation history stays intact.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke-token action sets revokedAt timestamp without deleting token record.",
        "Revoke-token action rejects already revoked or missing token identifiers.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/revokePersonalAccessToken.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/personalAccessTokenRepo.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
